title: The Last Cars Are Cut Away
description: Rocketman and the allied rescue force continue through Aqua Laguna, refusing to let the Sea Train escape.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Paulie, Iceburg, Zoro, Luffy, Sanji. Rocketman and the allied rescue force continue through Aqua Laguna, refusing to let the Sea Train escape.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Who did you think they were!

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Michael and Hayker from the old town?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Our enemies are the same now!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I will definitely kick his ass!!!

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: It won't end until we get them.

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: We're all heading in the same direction.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's no point in fighting separately!!

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: The sea train that's ahead of us...

summary: Rocketman and the allied rescue force continue through Aqua Laguna, refusing to let the Sea Train escape.
